news.title: Spirit Airlines shuts down after failing to reach a bailout deal, ending discount travel era
news.summary: Talks with bondholders for a government bailout this week failed to yield a deal. Talks are expected to resume next week. The Greek government is seeking a bailout of up to $100 billion.

news.title: Musk testimony dominated first week Musk v. Altman. 'You can't just steal a charity'
news.summary: Elon Musk took the stand and testified over the course of three days in his trial against OpenAI CEO Sam Altman. Musk is the world's richest person.

news.title: Weight loss and hair loss: The growing hair treatment market from GLP-1s
news.summary: A common side effect of many GLP-1 drugs is hair loss. It's creating a formerly untapped but growing market for hair treatment products.

news.title: Spirit Airlines shut down. Here's what travelers need to know if they have tickets
news.summary: . What travelers who are ticketed on Spirit Airlines need to know. What you need to do if you want to fly on Spirit.

news.title: The U.S.-Iran war is coming for your credit score and mortgage application
news.summary: The U.S.-Iran war and Strait of Hormuz closure have caused a global economic ripple effect. Your credit score included as banks and lenders get tighter.

news.title: Become a ‘lazy’ millionaire: This one habit can add a 20% bonus to your retirement
news.summary: The S&P 500 just banked its best month since 2020. But to keep those gains, stop celebrating and focus long-term.

news.title: Google is now a glorified venture-capital fund thanks to its SpaceX and Anthropic stakes
news.summary: Google’s early investments in SpaceX and Anthropic look like some of the “most successful venture bets any public company has ever made,” one expert says.

news.title: How this Japanese toilet maker became an unlikely AI winner
news.summary: Toto is “aiming to achieve a toilet that never needs cleaning” It’s also supplying electrostatic chucks — a semiconductor-manufacturing component critical to the memory-chip boom.

news.title: Meet the unsinkable U.S. economy — oil prices are surging, Iran tensions are rising, but it won’t crack
news.summary: Nothing in the turbulent past year has poked a hole in the seemingly unsinkable U.S. economy. High tariffs, stubborn inflation, government shutdowns, war with Iran, rising oil prices have all contributed.

news.title: EV drivers are taking a victory lap — right past the gas stations selling $4-a-gallon fuel
news.summary: Electric-vehicle drivers are taking a victory lap as the war in Iran has slowed global oil supplies and pushed up the cost of gasoline.
